IRT calibration pipeline is missing.", "recommended_fix": "Create the calibration service with schema validation, integrate with Supabase real-time user response stream, and add convergence checks using scipy.optimize with dynamic thresholds based on data volume."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "data pipeline", "issue": "No validation of user response timestamps against assessment active window, risking inclusion of invalid data.", "recommended_fix": "Add timestamp validation in ingestion pipeline to filter responses outside the active assessment period."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "IRT parameter estimation", "issue": "Hardcoded convergence threshold of 0.5 risks inaccurate calibration under varying data conditions.", "recommended_fix": "Implement dynamic convergence criteria based on data size and model stability metrics."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "The absence of a functioning IRT calibration pipeline undermines the validity of all AURA scores. findings.issue: File does not exist in codebase despite being referenced in recent findings. IRT calibration pipeline is missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Create the calibration service with schema validation, integrate with Supabase real-time user response stream, and add convergence checks using scipy.optimize with dynamic thresholds based on data volume.

findings.issue: No validation of user response timestamps against assessment active window, risking inclusion of invalid data.
findings.recommended_fix: Add timestamp validation in ingestion pipeline to filter responses outside the active assessment period.

findings.issue: Hardcoded convergence threshold of 0.5 risks inaccurate calibration under varying data conditions.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement dynamic convergence criteria based on data size and model stability metrics.

whistleblower_flag: The absence of a functioning IRT calibration pipeline undermines the validity of all AURA scores. This is a foundational integrity risk.
